'''zhabuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbusa|mbusa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbusa|mbusa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhabuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbichith|zhæbichith]] || [[word:zhæbichij|zhæbichij]] || [[word:zhæbichish|zhæbichish]] || [[word:zhæbichi|zhæbichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabubuchuth|zhabubuchuth]] || [[word:zhabubuchuj|zhabubuchuj]] || [[word:zhabubuchush|zhabubuchush]] || [[word:zhabubuchu|zhabubuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabuchuth|zhabuchuth]] || [[word:zhabuchuj|zhabuchuj]] || [[word:zhabuchush|zhabuchush]] || [[word:zhabuchu|zhabuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabufchuth|zhabufchuth]] || [[word:zhabufchuj|zhabufchuj]] || [[word:zhabufchush|zhabufchush]] || [[word:zhabufchuf|zhabufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabuchuthu|zhabuchuthu]] || [[word:zhabuchuju|zhabuchuju]] || [[word:zhabuchushu|zhabuchushu]] || [[word:zhabuchuku|zhabuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabuchuth|zhabuchuth]] || [[word:zhabuchuj|zhabuchuj]] || [[word:zhabuchush|zhabuchush]] || [[word:zhabuchu|zhabuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabuchuthul|zhabuchuthul]] || [[word:zhabuchujul|zhabuchujul]] || [[word:zhabuchushul|zhabuchushul]] || [[word:zhabuchukul|zhabuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabuchuthuthu|zhabuchuthuthu]] || [[word:zhabuchujuju|zhabuchujuju]] || [[word:zhabuchushushu|zhabuchushushu]] || [[word:zhabuchuku|zhabuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabuchuthun|zhabuchuthun]] || [[word:zhabuchujun|zhabuchujun]] || [[word:zhabuchushun|zhabuchushun]] || [[word:zhabuchukun|zhabuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabuchuthuoro|zhabuchuthuoro]] || [[word:zhabuchujuoro|zhabuchujuoro]] || [[word:zhabuchushuoro|zhabuchushuoro]] || [[word:zhabuchukuoro|zhabuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
